creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Edwin,
    
    Please note that PR ports/132139 has just been submitted.

Apparently something fell through the cracks.  This is the same as
PR ports/131886. A week ago I confirmed a week ago that it is an
update and approved the patch.

    If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug
    fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve
    the patch and a committer will take care of it.

So yes, please take care of this.

Regards

	jaap
